name: Knackebrod Ii:
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk and stir until a smooth dough forms.
4. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and roll it very thin.
5. Prick the dough with a fork, then cut into oblong pieces using a thimble to prevent tearing.
6. Make holes in each piece of dough.
7. Place the pieces on a slightly greased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 10 minutes in a slow oven.
